## Summary / 摘要

- What changed?
- 這次修改了什麼？

## Why / 原因

- Why is this change needed?
- 為什麼需要這個修改？

## Scope Check / 範圍確認

- [ ] This change fits the public handoff scope of the repository
- [ ] This change does not add private or confidential material
- [ ] Platform messaging remains accurate
- [ ] 這個修改符合公開交接 repo 的範圍
- [ ] 這個修改沒有加入私人或機密材料
- [ ] 平台對外描述仍然正確

## Platform Notes / 平台註記

- [ ] Windows-related
- [ ] Documentation-only
- [ ] macOS planning only
- [ ] 與 Windows 有關
- [ ] 只改文件
- [ ] 僅涉及 macOS 規劃

## Validation / 驗證

- Describe the checks, review steps, or manual verification used.
- 請描述做過哪些檢查、審閱步驟或人工驗證。

## Messaging Impact / 對外訊息影響

- [ ] No public messaging changed
- [ ] Public messaging changed and related docs were updated
- [ ] 沒有改動對外描述
- [ ] 已改動對外描述，且相關文件已同步更新
